name: sheet

description: Spring-animated slide-over panel for settings, filters, and mobile nav.
docs:
# Sheet
Spring-animated slide-over panel for settings, filters, and mobile nav.
## Import
```tsx
import { Sheet, SheetTrigger, SheetContent, SheetHeader, SheetTitle, SheetDescription, SheetBody } from "@/components/ui/sheet";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<Sheet side="right" title="Quick settings" placeholder={undefined} />
```
## Props
- **side** (string) — default: `"right"`: Side
- **title** (string) — default: `"Quick settings"`: Title
- **placeholder** (string): Placeholder
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx --yes github:Rydaguy101/aurora-ui add sheet
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/sheet
```
